properties.description: AXI write address/data/control remain stable while valid is asserted and ready is low.
AXI read address/control remain stable while ARVALID is asserted and ARREADY is low.
SRAM writes never include PCIe VDM or MCTP transport header bytes.
A completed descriptor is published only after the corresponding payload bytes are accepted by SRAM.
Packet or assembly drops suppress descriptor publication and increment the matching drop counter.
Each queue FSM stays in the legal idle/assemble/error states after reset release.

reason: Optional safety-property workflow recorded; local SymbiYosys execution is not required for this signoff pass.
